what_it_does: Defines an Overview React canvas — a system-health dashboard that shows stat tiles (colors, icons, components, inbox) with counts and deltas, a grid of clickable canvas tiles, and a recent-activity feed. Header actions provide Search (cmdK), Reset, Export to disk, and a 'Build something' AI action; every tile/stat calls onNav to route to its sub-canvas.
observations: Receives counts, onNav, recentActivity, onExport, onReset, onSearch as props — purely presentational, no internal state.
stats array has hardcoded delta strings ('+2 this week', '+12 new', '3 to triage') except inbox, whose delta is computed from counts.inboxNew.
deltaKind values ('up'/'gap') drive CSS class styling of the delta badge.
canvases grid mixes count-derived subs (counts.colorCount + ' tokens') with static descriptive subs ('Rules, examples, rewriter').
recentActivity rows render an icon (tone gold if a.color set, else bronze), text, by-line, and time.
Uses CvIcon and ViShape components, dsa-* classes, and CSS-var styling throughout.
'Live · last updated 1m ago' is a static string, not computed.
standouts: The 'Build something' AI action routes to the build canvas, positioning generation as a first-class entry point from the dashboard.
Inbox stat delta dynamically signals 'needs you' vs 'clear' based on counts.inboxNew, the one live-reactive stat.
conventions: Follows window-global registration (window.Overview = Overview) and React-via-globals.
Tokenized look via CSS vars and dsa-* classes, consistent with the design-system folder.
Presentational/container split — all data and handlers injected as props.
concerns: Several delta strings and 'last updated 1m ago' are hardcoded placeholder copy, not derived from real data — can drift from actual state.
recentActivity rows keyed by array index (key={i}), fragile under reordering/insertion.
logoCount referenced in canvases but not present in the stats array's counts usage, suggesting the counts shape must include it.
notes: A read-only dashboard surface that aggregates system counts and recent activity into navigable tiles; some metrics are still placeholder copy rather than live values.
questions: Are the static deltas ('+2 this week') intended placeholders to be wired to real metrics later?
What is the full shape of the counts prop (it must supply colorCount, iconCount, componentCount, inboxCount, inboxNew, logoCount)?
Where does onExport ('Export to disk') write, and what does onReset clear?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — header copy ('Everything ConceptV owns, at a glance') matches the implemented at-a-glance stat/canvas/activity dashboard.
apparent_themes: Single overview surface as the system's home
AI generation reachable from the top level
intention_signals: Aims to give one glanceable home that summarizes everything the design system owns, flags where the user is needed (inbox), and routes into every sub-canvas including a generation entry point.
novelty: Treats 'Build something' (AI generation) as a peer dashboard action alongside Search/Export, rather than burying generation inside a sub-tool.
contribution: Contributes the dashboard/home canvas: a stat-tile + canvas-grid + activity-feed layout with header actions (search, reset, export, build) and navigation routing into the rest of the system.
summary_for_embedding: A React Overview dashboard canvas showing count stat-tiles, a grid of navigable canvas tiles, and a recent-activity feed, with header actions for search/reset/export/AI-build.
intention_for_embedding: To provide one at-a-glance home that summarizes everything the design system owns and routes the user into every sub-canvas and into AI generation.
